_comment: Episode 02 AI regen prompts (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image / nano-banana). regen_vtuber_style.py가 _base_style + _preserve_subjects + per-cut prompt 세 부분을 합쳐서 전송. iterate은 per-cut 부분만 수정.
_base_style: Transform this photo into kawaii vtuber-style anime aesthetic with high-quality digital art rendering. Soft pink and gold palette throughout. Buddhist temple ambiance with subtle Eastern motifs (lotus, paper lanterns, traditional patterns). Vertical 9:16 composition. Maintain photorealistic pet features blended into the stylized scene.
_preserve_subjects: CRITICAL: Keep the pets faithfully recognizable. Orange tabby cat (Leo) — preserve all tabby stripes, amber eyes, pink nose, white whiskers, exact body proportions. Small French bulldog (Ryani) — brachycephalic flat-faced breed, NO TAIL, mostly BLACK BUT WITH DISTINCTIVE WHITE MARKINGS that you MUST PRESERVE: white blaze on chin/muzzle, white chest patch, and white toes/paws. Do not paint over or remove the white markings. Do not alter their poses, body proportions, or facial features. Only enhance the scene with decorations, halo, sparkles, lanterns, and stylized background — never modify the animals themselves.
cut1_peony_greeting: Add floating golden lotus petals around the cat and peony flowers, soft pink and gold sparkles throughout, a subtle warm halo/glow above the cat's head, dreamy bokeh background with hint of Buddhist temple architecture in the distance, neon-light accents in pink and gold tones. Festive but serene Buddha's Birthday greeting atmosphere.
cut2_sunbathe_meditate: Add warm golden sunbeam rays, floating cherry blossom petals drifting gently, soft pink lotus petals scattered, subtle meditation aura/halo around the cat, faint bamboo silhouettes and paper lantern shapes in the background, zen Buddhist temple courtyard ambiance. Peaceful sacred mood with pink/gold glow.
cut3_dance_party: Transform into a celebratory Buddhist festival party scene: vibrant pink and gold neon lights, glowing paper lanterns hanging overhead, lotus-shaped disco ball, floating music notes ♪♬, swirling confetti in traditional Korean dancheong colors (red, blue, yellow, green), tiny party hats on both pets, sparkles and glitter trails. Energetic hip vtuber celebration vibe — like a temple festival rave but kawaii.
cut4_cuddle_peace: Add soft floating paper lanterns in pink and gold drifting in the background, gentle lotus petals drifting down, warm cozy bokeh glow, subtle twinkling stars and sparkles around the sleeping pets, faint Buddhist temple silhouette in the distance, peaceful nighttime serenity. Cozy intimate mood with warm pink/gold palette.
